description: Map-only clean versions of the premium Lantau poster-map concepts. Global poster titles, subtitles, and footer captions have been removed while retaining map labels, terrain, route geometry, and the tourist-plan hand annotations.

source_data.name: Lands Department 5 m-grid Digital Terrain Model

notes: Generated concepts, not copies of Tiny Island Maps. Tourist-plan variant keeps the airport as the starting point and retains the fake hand-drawn route annotations.
